## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Contribution Type

- [ ] Daily cyber patch
- [ ] Threat suggestion or source update
- [ ] Detection, remediation, or verification command
- [ ] Skill or agent instruction
- [ ] Governance, safety, or documentation update

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This contribution is defensive and educational.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private logs, customer data, internal URLs, or local machine paths.
- [ ] I did not include offensive exploit chains, weaponized payloads, persistence instructions, stealth instructions, or obfuscated code.
- [ ] I did not include commands that print environment variables, auth files, cookies, SSH keys, shell history, or secret stores.
- [ ] I did not include shortened links, opaque downloads, or `curl | bash` style instructions.
- [ ] Runnable commands are readable, defensive, and include verification steps.
- [ ] If this is maintainer-authored, maintainer self-review is complete and no approval from another person is required.
- [ ] If this is external or non-maintainer-authored, maintainer review is required before merge.

## Sources

List public sources for current-threat, vendor-incident, CVE, package-compromise, or exploitation claims.

## AI Assistance

- [ ] I used AI to draft, research, review, or test this contribution.
- [ ] I did not use AI for this contribution.

If AI was used, briefly describe how.
